title: Any OSS models as good as GPT-4o-mini?
abstract: Exactly what the title says. I've recently realized I rarely need something as powerful as GPT5 (or as expensive!). GPT-4o-mini has been doing the job well. Curious to see if OSS has caught up to this model in anyone's experience.
abstract_zh: 嘿，各位！最近我发现GPT5用得少了，就像平时出去玩儿，真的不需要啥高端装备。GPT-4o-mini这小东西倒是挺靠谱的，跟它聊天就像找了个会说话的小精灵。现在就想问问大家：开源社区里有没有哪个模型能跟我这小家伙掰手腕？求个对比测评！
